description: A sensor at the water treatment plant shows a sudden spike in turbidity levels in the raw water intake.

nodes.task_description: Receive and acknowledge the high turbidity alarm from the plant's SCADA system.

expected_outcome.value: System logs the critical water quality alarm.

nodes.task_description: Check upstream sensors and weather data to identify a potential cause, such as a heavy rainfall event causing runoff.

expected_outcome.value: System correlates the turbidity spike with a recent thunderstorm in the watershed.

nodes.task_description: Automatically adjust the coagulant dosage in the treatment process to handle the increased turbidity.

expected_outcome.value: System sends a new setpoint to the chemical dosing pumps.
